Families lay flowers on barbed wire barricade on anniversary of deadly Kenya protests
clusters.summary: Protesters demand justice for the dozens killed during the 2024 demonstrations and last year's anniversary protests.

clusters.headline: Kenya: Eight Utumishi Girls Students to Be Charged Over Deadly School Fire
clusters.summary: [Capital FM] Nairobi -- Eight students linked to the deadly fire at Utumishi Girls' School in Gilgil will be formally charged in court on Friday following a hearing in Naivasha, prosecutors have confirmed.

clusters.headline: Cote d'Ivoire: Côte d'Ivoire Make World Cup History As Pépé Double Sends Elephants Through
clusters.summary: [CAF] Côte d'Ivoire reached the knockout stage of the FIFA World Cup for the first time in their history after Nicolas Pépé scored twice in a composed 2-0 win over Curaçao in Philadelphia on Thursday night.

clusters.headline: Swatch claiming $170 million in damages against Samsung over trademark infringement, FT reports
Man jailed after joining Cambodia scam syndicate that fired him in 3 days for poor performance
clusters.summary: Yip Chee Ming was unsuccessful in making any scam calls while at the syndicate's compound.

clusters.headline: 'They can kill you': African migrants fear a surge in xenophobic violence in South Africa
clusters.summary: Foreign-owned businesses have been attacked, African migrants driven from their homes, and several killed. A leading xenophobic group has given all undocumented immigrants until June 30 to leave the country.

clusters.headline: Namibia: Rainstorms Wreak Havoc in //Kharas ...Roofs Snatched, Families Forced to Rebuild
clusters.summary: [New Era] BLOUWES - Recent heavy rainfall accompanied by strong winds in //Kharas has left three homes at Farm Blouwes without roofs, forcing affected households to start from scratch.

clusters.headline: 'I buried my parents one day after the other' - Ebola mourners learn how to grieve safely
clusters.summary: A cemetery at the epicentre of the outbreak is rapidly filling up, however large traditional funerals have been scrapped.

clusters.headline: UN agency pauses evacuation of ships through the Strait of Hormuz after attack on vessel
Women alleging rape and sexual assault in France call to abolish statute of limitations
clusters.summary: More than 50 women are calling for the abolition of the statute of limitations which they say has prevented them seeking justice.
